---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the plugin or stack_core
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- One paragraph: what's broken / inefficient / missing today? Who is affected? -->

## User & job

<!-- Which role experiences the problem (Field Officer / PM / Stack Admin / DevOps / …) and what are they trying to accomplish? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- 3–7 bullets describing the major pieces. Each bullet should map to one of: skill / agent / command / hook / stack_core feature / docs. -->

-
-
-

## Out of scope

<!-- What you are NOT proposing. Forces clarity. -->

-
-

## Success metric

<!-- How will we know it worked? Concrete and measurable. "Time-to-X drops from N to M within D days." -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why is this the right shape? -->

## Effort estimate (if you have a guess)

- [ ] S — half-day or less
- [ ] M — 1–3 days
- [ ] L — 1–2 weeks
- [ ] XL — multiple sprints
